Trusted Raleigh Lawn Care Experts

Lawn care tailored to Raleigh's climate

We understand how Piedmont clay and humid summers affect your lawn. Our team designs maintenance plans that work with Raleigh's unique conditions.

Family Owned & Operated Industry Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating
5.0 5.0 A+
Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Marcus T.

After years of watching water pool in my Five Points backyard, Apex Lawn Care's aeration made an immediate difference. They explained how the red clay was preventing drainage and even showed me the soil plugs. My lawn finally absorbs rain instead of shedding it onto the sidewalk.

N
Nina R.

The fescue blend they used in our North Hills yard survived last July's heatwave when every other lawn on the street went brown. I appreciate how they matched the new grass to our existing turf - you can't tell where they reseeded except it's noticeably thicker.

D
David and Sarah K.

When an oak limb crushed our garden in Brier Creek, their team arrived within hours. They carefully removed debris without damaging our perennials, then leveled the ruts with soil that matched our existing grade. The repair was so seamless our neighbors didn't realize we'd had damage.

E
Elena P.

As NC State employees, we're conscious of runoff into Lake Raleigh. Their organic program has given us the greenest lawn on the block without the guilt. The soil test revealed our phosphorus levels were high, so they customized a blend that's helping balance our soil naturally.

Additional Lawn Care Services

Core Aeration Drought-Resistant Overseeding Storm Recovery Irrigation Winterization

Apex Lawn Care — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every lawn care project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Apex Lawn Care Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific lawn care needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Raleigh & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Raleigh, NC and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Durham Cary Chapel Hill Apex Morrisville Holly Springs Wake Forest Fuquay-Varina
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our lawn care services.

Will aeration damage my sprinkler system?

We use utility maps and physical markers to avoid irrigation lines. In 12 years, we've never caused sprinkler damage.

How soon can I mow after aeration?

Wait 48 hours to allow soil structure to stabilize. The small holes will naturally fill in within 2-3 weeks.

Built on Raleigh Values

Schedule your free assessment today. We'll analyze your soil and create a customized plan.

Let's Begin →
